root.sql:
select sum(tab.row_memno)over( order by tab.receipt_date ,tab.branch_id ,tab.sort_order ,tab.money_type_id ,tab.bank_fin , tab.entry_id ,tab.receipt_no ,tab.sort_group_item ) as rowno, tab.* from ( SELECT decode(lag(sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no,1,null)over( order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin , sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) ) ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no,0,1) as row_memno, sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date as receipt_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no as receipt_no ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) as sort_group_item ,to_tdate(sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date) as tdate_cancel_date ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no as membership_no ,PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as membername ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status as receipt_status
,sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item as group_item , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_com_m_receipt.cheque_date
,case when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'LON' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description|| ( select ' (*)' from sc_lon_m_loan_card where loan_contract_no = trim( sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) and loan_code <> '0' ) when sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item = 'ISP' then sc_com_m_receipt_item.description --FPB_GET_INSURE_NAME( sc_com_m_receipt_item.description ) else sc_com_m_receipt_item.description end as description
,sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id as entry_id
,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order as sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id as money_type_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_name as money_type_name
,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id as branch_id ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_name as branch_name
,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.principal_amount , 0 ) as principal_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.interest_amount , 0 ) as interest_amount ,decode( sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_status , '0' , sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount , 0 ) as item_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.ppm_status as ppm_status ,sc_com_m_receipt.keep_monthly as keep_monthly , decode( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.group_item , 'LON' , FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) , sc_com_m_receipt_item.loan_type ) as loan_type ,sc_fin_m_bank.account_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name ,sc_acc_m_account_master.account_name ,( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_com_m_receipt_item where receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) as sum_rec
,sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_amount ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_trans_return ,sc_com_m_receipt.calcint_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_date ,sc_com_m_receipt.cancel_id , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_desc FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_com_m_receipt, sc_com_m_receipt_item, sc_com_m_ucf_money_type, sc_com_m_branch , sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type ,si_security_user ,sc_fin_m_bank ,sc_acc_m_account_master ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type
WHERE ( sc_com_m_receipt.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.receipt_no = sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_com_m_receipt.membership_no ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id ) and ( sc_com_m_receipt.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ) and ( sc_com_m_ucf_receipt_item_type.item_type_id = sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_type_id ) and ( ( sc_com_m_receipt_item.item_amount > 0 ) )
and si_security_user.user_id = sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id not in ( 'FUN' ) and sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.account_type = 'FBK' and sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin = sc_com_m_receipt.fin_bank and sc_fin_m_bank.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_type.mem_type_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.mem_type /*WHERE*/ order by sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_date ,sc_com_m_branch.branch_id ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.sort_order ,sc_com_m_receipt.money_type_id ,sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin , sc_com_m_receipt.entry_id ,sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no ,( case group_item when 'SHR' then 1 when 'LON' then 5 else 99 end ) )tab

r_ktm_receipt_payment_tran_nest_verify.sql: SELECT sc_fin_m_bank_payment.item_no, sc_fin_m_bank_payment.item_amount, sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin, sc_fin_m_bank.bank_name, sc_fin_m_bank_statement.seq_no, sc_fin_m_bank_statement.operate_date FROM sc_fin_m_bank_payment, sc_fin_m_bank, sc_fin_m_bank_statement WHERE ( sc_fin_m_bank.bank_fin = sc_fin_m_bank_payment.bank_fin ) and ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.bank_fin = sc_fin_m_bank_statement.bank_fin ) and ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.seq_no = sc_fin_m_bank_statement.seq_no ) and ( ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.finance_date = {0} ) AND ( sc_fin_m_bank_statement.verify_amount > 0 ) AND ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.pay_method = 'TSP' ) AND ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.cancel_status = '0' ) AND ( sc_fin_m_bank_payment.entry_br = {1} ) )
